creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text: Li-Wen , You need a security/openssl111-quictls and security/openssl3-quictls , not in the src/mainstream. Rational is that not all the apps are ported over to openssl3. Currently security/openssl-quictls should be rename security/openssl3-quictls .  This URL https://github.com/quictls/openssl/tree/OpenSSL_1_1_1m+quic should be what security/openssl111-quictls is based on.  As for updates, https://www.openssl.org/ issue.
